name: History of M&As in the Blockchain Space
description: A comprehensive account of M&A activity across the blockchain space. M&As reveal how an industry matures: what firms buy instead of build, which models survive downturns, and where moats form. Deal data is scattered across press releases, blogs, and exchange filings; we're pulling it together.

name: Distribution Markets Proof of Concept
description: A proof-of-concept for distribution markets: an AMM-based prediction market that outputs full probability distributions over continuous outcomes instead of discrete options. We model positions with CDFs and discrete thresholds to keep on-chain execution intuitive while sharing collateral across quantiles. Building in Rust on Solana.

name: Pro-rata Markets in Crypto-Equities
description: Evaluating whether pro-rata order books (allocate by size, not time) improve liquidity for crypto-equities that trade 24/7. We compare pro-rata to FIFO on spread, depth, adverse selection, and resiliency, and identify when pro-rata helps versus when it encourages oversized quoting or fragility.

name: Polymarket Trading Project
description: Automated arbitrage and market-making on Polymarket. We focus on negative risk events: disjoint outcomes where one always resolves Yes. We explore sum-of-Yes and sum-of-No arbitrage conditions and execution.

name: Hedging Spot Crypto Volatility
description: Using Kalshi Crypto Event Contracts to hedge spot exposure. Treating Bitcoin futures markets as option-like instruments, we build a framework for retail investors to control risk without giving up spot exposure.

name: Correlated Markets & Signal Forecasting
description: We explore whether correlated prediction markets improve signal extraction beyond a single market. We test if cross-market dependence smooths noise and detects regime shifts, with applications from sports (NFL MVP) to AI narratives.

name: The Blockchain Thesis
description: What's the most realistic blockchain use case inside an established company? Starting from corporate constraints (ROI, regulation, integration), we evaluate whether blockchain beats traditional systems or is just hand-wavy.
